title: Debris White
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1272dd160e84693fe3872b31801e088f33f7294c.jpeg)
# **📖 About**
This resource pack **changes the color of Ancient Debris to white**. It makes the ore much more visible and easier to spot while mining in the Nether. ⛏️✨

# **❓ FAQ**

**Does it require OptiFine?**
- No! It works perfectly in Vanilla, Fabric, or Forge. 🛠️

**Will it work on older versions?**
- Yes! Even if Minecraft says it's "incompatible," just click Yes. It works from 1.16 all the way to 1.21.4+. ✅
